{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Meloch’nillium
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Meloch’nillium]] is a bracelet that appears to be made of raw starfire.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
